title: Nashik court closes defamation case against Rahul Gandhi over remarks about Vinayak Savarkar
description: A criminal court in Nashik closed a defamation case filed against Congress leader and Lok Sabha MP Rahul Gandhi over his remarks on Hindutva ideologue Vinayak Damodar Savarkar during the Bharat Jodo Yatra in 2022.The complaint was lodged by Devendra Bhutada, president of the Nashik-based Nirbhaya Foundation, who alleged that Gandhi’s comments at rallies in Hingoli and Akole on June 15 and 16, 2022, were defamatory and insulting.Based on Bhutada’s plea, offences under sections 499 (defamation) an
